name: Another Dump Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 can fruit (pie filling, canned fruit, or enough fresh fruit to cover the bottom of the pan nicely)
1/2 box Jiffy Cake Mix (or 1 box of a normal cake mix)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour fruit into the bottom of an 8x8 inch pan.
2. Sprinkle cake mix over the fruit, making sure to cover all corners well.
3. Cut small pats of butter and place them on top of the cake mix.
4. Bake at 350°F until golden brown. For a 13 x 9 pan, double the recipe.
5. Leaving a small amount of juice from the canned fruit in the pan helps create a nicer crust and juicier filling.
Notes:
I have made this with various fruits from the Frozen Assets List and it has never turned out bad!
